THE� BRAINCHILD� OF� MODE� MOBILE

Built by Deloitte’s #1 Fastest Growing Software Company

From 2019-2022, Mode Mobile produced $50M+ in revenue and by 2024 empowered its users to earn and save over $250M!

Consumers spend an average of 25% of their waking hours on devices and they deserve to get paid for it. EARN'M is the Web3 embodiment of that mission.

modemobile.com

Deloitte Ranked #1 Fastest Growing Software Company in North America 2023 (2nd Overall)

EARN'M BEYOND MOBILE

EARN'M Wherever You Trade, Listen, Watch, Chat, Read, Game, & Scroll

While 90% of online usage occurs on mobile devices, the EARN'M Loyalty Ecosystem is fully compatible across desktops and tablets.

Apply for Governance Grant

Compatible Partners:

ENFTs are designed to be distributed alongside traditional Web2 rewards.

WEB3 REWARDS + WEB2 REDEMPTIONS = HAPPIER USERS 😁

ENFTs in Action!

$EARNFT allows any redemption-based platform to supercharge their rewards. � Platforms can now distribute gamified Web3 rewards alongside traditional user redemptions — enhancing platform margins & introducing billions of new users to Web3.

Since each ENFT is loot boxed, every redemption becomes a potential windfall for users.

MORE THAN JUST CRYPTO

Mystery Boxes Are Loaded with Prizes

Along with $EARNM Tokens, every Mystery Box also contains 100 Entries to $EARNM’s worldwide, advertiser-sponsored Sweepstakes.  Giving every Mystery Box owner the chance to win $100k cash prizes, exotic sports cars, and other rotating prize packages.

OUR MISSION

Helping People Monetize Their Screen Time

Across the world, the average person needs extra cash more than ever. � While at the same time people are also using their devices more than ever.  

That’s why the team at EARN'M is working to help reward people for their online activity.

Read Our Manifesto

To date, over 1.7B Mystery Box Sweepstakes Entries have been distributed worldwide.

THE ROADMAP

Where We've Been and Where We're Going

2017-2022

$36 million token offering for Current’s $CRNC Security Token, supported by the investment partners listed below...

Helped the Mode Earn App reach #1 in the Google Play Store

Enabled rewards for the world’s first EarnPhone — now at Wal-Mart, Amazon, Best Buy, & more

Featured in prominent tech & business publications including:

2023

Alpha-issuance of 17M+ Mystery Boxes to Mode Mobile earners

Alpha Launch of $EARNM Loyalty Ecosystem dApp

Sweepstakes Entries Integrated into All EARN'M Mystery Boxes

2024 & Beyond

Public launch of $EARNM Token & dApp

Enable any smartphone provider to launch proprietary EarnPhone solutions worldwide

Extended Launch of the EARN'Mopoly Collection

We cannot assure you that the forward-looking statements will prove to be accurate. Furthermore, if the forward-looking statements prove inaccurate, the inaccuracy may be material.
